ksa_text: Knowledge of change management frameworks (Prosci ADKAR, Kotter) and how to adapt them for data and AI capability deployments with heterogeneous user populations.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of resource management principles and techniques.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Knowledge of resource management principles and techniques.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA OP-K-003 (Operations & Program Management/Knowledge) excluded: out_of_scope: 0 core signals, 1 OOS signals, composite 0.414. Highest framework: EU AI Act at 0.414.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Exclude consistent with out_of_scope scope, Operations & Program Management, composite 0.414. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge exclusion of Operations & Program Management (composite 0.414)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Operations & Program Management at ~5% market presence. Program management above scope. Exclusion consistent with role scope.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent. Final decision: exclude.
